title: On Julia's Breath.
content:
Breathe, Julia, breathe, and I'll protest,
    Nay more, I'll deeply swear,
    That all the spices of the east
    Are circumfused there.
meaning:
"On Julia's Breath." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
